description: Commercial note, listing the prices of various goods. Indigo (nīl): 50. Boxthorn (khawlān), something else, and myrrh: 17.5. (?)צחפיה: seven(?). Beads (kharaz): 5. 15 dinars. "The remainder sold in the Dār al-Wakāla: 5 dinars." At the bottom lists musk, a number, and the term mithqāl. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
